summary: Branch ships the IsExecuting recursion guard (replacing FoundationalChannels), root-cause-first conversion errors, per-step builder confidence, and a 'builder' channel routing seam. Closed five documentation gaps — stale FoundationalChannels references in io-channels.md / app-tree.md / check-app-tree.sh, missing confidence + builder-channel sections in build.md, and a good_to_know entry on the 'recursion guard belongs on the value' OBP lesson. No XML doc gaps, no PLang example gaps, no proposals to evaluate.

changes.description: Rewrote three sections that referenced deleted FoundationalChannels / PushChannelsOverride / FreezeFoundational APIs. Channel.Goal.@this paragraph now describes the AsyncLocal<bool> _executing guard with the registry Get() branch. 'Actor channel resolution' block reduced to single direct-registry property with a historical note pointing at the foundational-snapshot bug repro. 'Replace output with a goal channel' example rewritten to a sibling-channel fan-out (the old example would now surface ChannelNotFound).

Dropped 'FreezeFoundational() — snapshot boot-time channels' line from the Actor tree (API gone). Added a one-paragraph back-pointer to io-channels.md noting where goal-channel recursion isolation now lives.
Removed actor_skip_regex='^(FoundationalChannels)$'. The canary it skipped is gone; the script now checks actor properties without exceptions.

Added 'Confidence per step' section (level table + warning shape + trace-file paths). Added 'Builder output routing' section (BuilderChannel.goal / EmitBuildEvent.goal / templates/output/build-output.template architecture, why the indirection exists as a redirection seam, EmitSummary gate removal note).

Appended 'Recursion guards belong on the value, not on a parallel context layer' — the OBP shape lesson this branch's load-bearing change codifies. Includes the migrated example (channels), the failure mode of the deleted approach (foundational-snapshot bug), tells for drifting back into shape #1, and when shape #1 is legitimately the right answer (when the overlay needs to expose *different values*, not just hide the calling instance).

findings.issue: Three sections described the deleted FoundationalChannels / PushChannelsOverride / FreezeFoundational mechanism as load-bearing. A reader following the doc lands on APIs that do not compile.
Actor block listed FreezeFoundational() as a public API.
findings.detail: Dropped the line; added back-pointer per change id 2.

findings.issue: actor_skip_regex still exempted FoundationalChannels (the property no longer exists, so the exemption is dead and would mask any future drift if a property of the same name were added).

Per-step confidence (planner + compiler, emitted by 4 LLM passes) and the new 'builder' channel routing (BuilderChannel.goal / EmitBuildEvent / template) were undocumented. The diagnostic recipe added in commit 659909d4f mentions confidence in passing but does not document the levels or the architecture.
findings.detail: Added two new sections per change id 4.

findings.issue: The 'recursion guard on the value not on the context overlay' OBP lesson — codified in the branch's load-bearing C# change — was not recorded as a cross-cutting pattern. Worth capturing to prevent a future author re-implementing the deleted snapshot-overlay shape.
